heading: Payment of fees, commissions, etc.; deposit in Treasury
label: 79c Payment of fees, commissions, etc.; deposit in Treasury
text: No provision of this Act shall relieve any public land applicant or claimant from the necessity of making payment of fees, commissions, or other moneys required by law or regulation. Commencing sixty days after , the officials of district land offices shall not receive any compensation based on fees, commissions, or other receipts and all amounts collected by them shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States.April 24, 1944
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , which enacted sections 79a to 79c of this title, repealed sections 80 and 80a of this title, and enacted provisions set out as notes under this section. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Apr. 24, 1944, ch. 17758 Stat. 215
